description: Defines scalable score group metadata for StockAI rule aggregation.

PriceStateScore.description: Price location, candle quality, and short-term price behavior.

TrendScore.description: Moving average alignment, slope, and trend stability.

VWAPScore.description: VWAP hold, reclaim, and intraday institutional reference behavior.

BreakoutScore.description: Breakout probability, reliability, and failure risk.

VolumeScore.description: Volume expansion, persistence, and exhaustion signals.

IntradayScore.description: Intraday range, reversal, and multi-timeframe alignment.

OrderbookScore.description: Orderbook imbalance, spread, and liquidity quality.

FlowScore.description: Foreign, institution, retail, and capital flow behavior.

FinancialScore.description: Financial health, distress, and earnings surprise.

MacroScore.description: Rates, FX, and macro event risk.

SentimentScore.description: Crowd behavior, FOMO, and narrative fatigue.

RiskScore.description: Downside, liquidity, quality, and listing risk.

ConfidenceScore.description: Data reliability and independent signal confirmation.
